title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: 1. **High: strict upstream gate can be bypassed via direct native entrypoint.** [`run-slide-delivery.js` L41](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L41) and [`run-slide-delivery.js` L506](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L506) accept direct execution without `workflow-decision` / `selection_required` checks, while docs still advertise direct use at [`workflow-phase-spec.md` L114](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/references/workflow-phase-spec.md#L114). For minimal architecture, this path should be internal-only or removed from public docs. 2. **High: native PDF conversion can falsely pass on stale `output.pdf`.** [`run-slide-delivery.js` L175](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L175), [`run-slide-delivery.js` L192](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L192), and reuse of same path at [`run-slide-delivery.js` L524](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L524) / [`run-slide-delivery.js` L544](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L544). This is extra-complex + fragile behavior for a “reliable QC gate”. 3. **Medium: delivery QC includes content-mutation repair logic beyond minimal gate scope.** Template normalization / placeholder rewrite / fallback bullet insertion in [`run-slide-delivery.js` L302](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L302), [`run-slide-delivery.js` L359](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L359), [`run-slide-delivery.js` L393](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L393), applied at [`run-slide-delivery.js` L742](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L742). For minimal architecture, QC should mostly validate/block, not rewrite slide content. 4. **Medium: Manus `PREVIEW_ONLY` fallback path is heavier than required.** Recursive “parse every file as JSON” manifest discovery at [`run-slide-variant-matrix.js` L200](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L200) plus HTML materialization/index synthesis at [`run-slide-variant-matrix.js` L224](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L224). Minimal fallback only needs deterministic manifest detection + concise selection metadata. 5. **Medium: adapter wrapper has duplicate control paths for the same gating job.** `--dry-run` and `--resolve-only` dual behavior in [`slide-script-prep-adapter.sh` L6](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/slide-script-prep-adapter.sh#L6), [`slide-script-prep-adapter.sh` L94](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/slide-script-prep-adapter.sh#L94), [`slide-script-prep-adapter.sh` L105](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/slide-script-prep-adapter.sh#L105), plus split env/json gate parsing at [`slide-script-prep-adapter.sh` L124](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/slide-script-prep-adapter.sh#L124). Can be collapsed to one strict `check` contract. 6. **Low: docs are still broader than the minimal architecture target.** Core skill spec includes many non-core guardrails/outputs at [`slide/SKILL.md` L41](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L41), [`slide/SKILL.md` L52](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L52), [`slide/SKILL.md` L93](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L93). `workflow-phase-spec` still describes a 9-phase system beyond the four minimal guarantees at [`workflow-phase-spec.md` L5](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/references/workflow-phase-spec.md#L5). 7. **Low: key minimal paths are under-tested.** No unit coverage for stale-PDF behavior / conversion loop (`runPptxToPdf`) despite tests in [`test-unit-delivery-orchestrator.js` L8](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-delivery-orchestrator.js#L8). No unit coverage for `findManusManifest` / `writePreviewOnlyVariant` in [`test-unit-vari...
